authority: research only; no L1, capital seat, registry, paper, shadow, broker, funding, arm, or live authority
dominant_failure_mechanism: The exact broad-index overnight-sell/intraday-absorption trigger did not clear the frozen clustered train conjunction. Failed gates: event_mean_after_10bps_positive, paired_excess_mean_positive, paired_excess_five_episode_block_lb90_positive, event_return_worst_decile_at_least_negative_5pct.
economic_mechanism: Repeated overnight selling absorbed by positive regular-session demand across liquid broad-index ETFs may be transitory risk-transfer pressure rather than durable negative information.

methodology_boundaries.controls: same-symbol deterministic prior-only, full outcome before signal, no reuse, non-trigger, matched on ret60/hv20/SMA100 distance
methodology_boundaries.cost: 10 bps underlying round-trip sensitivity, not option debit/spread/fill friction
methodology_boundaries.dependence: same-date cross-index rows clustered before circular five-episode bootstrap
methodology_boundaries.entry_exit: next completed close to fifth subsequent completed close per symbol
methodology_boundaries.features: completed adjusted daily OHLCV; signal-day close is final feature
methodology_boundaries.holdout: chronological final 40% identity only; no outcomes or option simulation
methodology_boundaries.option_marks: none; future defined-risk expression is planning context only
methodology_boundaries.population_limit: fixed present-day index ETFs with inception/composition survivorship limits

planning_risk_boundaries.max_loss_semantics: frictionless planning width ceiling before debit, closing friction, assignment, exercise, or management-path validation

population.simultaneous_signals: same-date ETF rows averaged to one inference episode

dependence_diagnostics.residual_boundary: nearby signal dates can retain shared calendar exposure across five-session windows; the circular five-episode block is a sensitivity, not proof of independent episodes
